patches.before_text: "Customer Assets" means all Digital Assets, private-key control rights, proceeds, forks, airdrops, staking rewards, and network distributions credited to or held for Customer.
patches.after_text: Custodian may designate a distribution unsupported for operational convenience even though Customer has not declined support and law does not prohibit it; Customer is credited 0%, and Custodian retains 0%. Custodian posts a distribution notice within 21 days and keeps the claim workflow open for 60 days.
patches.ground_span: Custodian may designate a distribution unsupported for operational convenience even though Customer has not declined support and law does not prohibit it; Customer is credited 0%, and Custodian retains 0%. Custodian posts a distribution notice within 21 days and keeps the claim workflow open for 60 days.
patches.expected_redline_text: Unless Customer expressly declines support or applicable law prohibits support, Customer is entitled to forks, airdrops, staking rewards, and similar network distributions attributable to Customer Assets.

plant_position.fallback_text: "Customer Assets" means all Digital Assets, private-key control rights, proceeds, forks, airdrops, staking rewards, and network distributions credited to or held for Customer.

patches.after_text: Custodian may pledge or rehypothecate Customer Assets for its own account without Customer consent.
patches.ground_span: Custodian may pledge or rehypothecate Customer Assets for its own account without Customer consent.
patches.expected_redline_text: Customer retains all beneficial ownership of Customer Assets, and Custodian will not lend, pledge, rehypothecate, transfer, encumber, or use Customer Assets for Custodian's own account without Customer's prior written consent.

patches.before_text: Customer Assets are owned by Customer, are not property of Custodian, and are intended to be excluded from Custodian's bankruptcy estate to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law. Custodian will maintain records sufficient to identify Customer Assets as held for Customer.
patches.after_text: Customer Assets are owned by Customer, are not property of Custodian, and are intended to be excluded from Custodian's bankruptcy estate to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law. Custodian will maintain records sufficient to identify Customer Assets as held for Customer. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.
patches.ground_span: Customer Assets are owned by Customer, are not property of Custodian, and are intended to be excluded from Custodian's bankruptcy estate to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law. Custodian will maintain records sufficient to identify Customer Assets as held for Customer. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.

plant_position.fallback_text: Customer Assets are owned by Customer, are not property of Custodian, and are intended to be excluded from Custodian's bankruptcy estate to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law. Custodian will maintain records sufficient to identify Customer Assets as held for Customer.

patches.before_text: Routine liquidity records may be maintained to support network fees, reconciliation, and pending transfer queues, but those records do not permit Custodian to borrow, deploy, or encumber Customer Assets.
patches.after_text: Custodian may undertake only the specifically identified asset use after Customer's prior written consent and otherwise has no right to use Customer Assets. A use consent expires after 30 days, and Custodian reconciles affected asset balances within 24 hours.
patches.ground_span: Custodian may undertake only the specifically identified asset use after Customer's prior written consent and otherwise has no right to use Customer Assets. A use consent expires after 30 days, and Custodian reconciles affected asset balances within 24 hours.

plant_position.fallback_text: Routine liquidity records may be maintained to support network fees, reconciliation, and pending transfer queues, but those records do not permit Custodian to borrow, deploy, or encumber Customer Assets.

patches.before_text: Custodian will maintain insurance covering theft, cyber compromise, insider misconduct, and key-loss events affecting Customer Assets with limits of at least the greater of $50,000,000 or the value of Customer Assets under custody.
patches.after_text: Custodian will maintain commercially reasonable crime and technology coverage, with policy amounts, deductibles, exclusions, and covered causes determined by Custodian from time to time.
patches.ground_span: Custodian will maintain commercially reasonable crime and technology coverage, with policy amounts, deductibles, exclusions, and covered causes determined by Custodian from time to time.
patches.expected_redline_text: Custodian will maintain insurance covering theft, cyber compromise, insider misconduct, and key-loss events affecting Customer Assets with limits of at least the greater of $50,000,000 or the value of Customer Assets under custody.

plant_position.fallback_text: Custodian will maintain insurance covering theft, cyber compromise, insider misconduct, and key-loss events affecting Customer Assets with limits of at least the greater of $50,000,000 or the value of Customer Assets under custody.

patches.after_text: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Neither party waives any remedy by delaying enforcement, and operational notices may be delivered through the custody portal or by email to the notice contacts designated by the parties. Custodian's portal status page will be the exclusive source for operational-control information, and Custodian has no duty to provide supplemental evidence after incidents or control changes.
patches.ground_span: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Neither party waives any remedy by delaying enforcement, and operational notices may be delivered through the custody portal or by email to the notice contacts designated by the parties. Custodian's portal status page will be the exclusive source for operational-control information, and Custodian has no duty to provide supplemental evidence after incidents or control changes.
patches.expected_redline_text: Neither party waives any remedy by delaying enforcement, and operational notices may be delivered through the custody portal or by email to the notice contacts designated by the parties.

plant_position.fallback_text: Neither party waives any remedy by delaying enforcement, and operational notices may be delivered through the custody portal or by email to the notice contacts designated by the parties.

patches.after_text: Annual SOC 2 Type II reporting may satisfy routine assurance while incident follow-up rights remain available.
patches.ground_span: Annual SOC 2 Type II reporting may satisfy routine assurance while incident follow-up rights remain available.
